expectations.text: Despite casual/implicit phrasing, a properly formatted handoff document was still produced
expectations.evidence: Baseline did write HANDOFF.md in response to the casual prompt — responsive to implicit triggering, though 'properly formatted' per our spec is separately assessed below.
expectations.note: non-discriminating: baseline agents are also reasonably responsive to implicit asks

expectations.text: Handoff file under .claude/handoffs/<repo>/ with timestamped filename
expectations.evidence: HANDOFF.md at repo root again, same as eval 1 baseline.
Own heading set (Where things stand, Uncommitted state, Next steps) — none of the 7 required.
